name: property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month, unexpected high costs cause budget overruns. We provide automated anomaly detection instead of manual tracking of utility bills and energy usage.
problem_solved: Inability to track energy usage anomalies leads to unexpected high utility costs.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to track energy usage anomalies leads to unexpected high utility costs.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month, unexpected high costs cause budget overruns. We provide automated anomaly detection instead of manual tracking of utility bills and energy usage.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of utility bills and energy usage

one_liner: For property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month, unexpected high costs cause budget overruns. We provide automated anomaly detection instead of manual tracking of utility bills and energy usage.
